title: Steroids in Critical Care: Practical ICU Guide
summary: A practical ICU guide to steroid use in critical care, including steroid pharmacology, COVID, viral pneumonia, influenza, community-acquired pneumonia, septic shock, ARDS, status asthmaticus, anaphylaxis, tapering, and bedside controversies.

title: ACLS: The Complete Resident Guide to Running a Code
summary: A complete resident guide to ACLS and running a code, including 2-minute cycles, high-quality CPR, shockable and non-shockable rhythms, medications, Hs and Ts, airway management, ETCO2, post-ROSC care, and termination of resuscitation.

title: Bradycardia and Conduction System Disease: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: A complete resident guide to bradycardia and conduction system disease including ACLS management, atropine, dopamine, epinephrine, transcutaneous pacing, transvenous pacing, sinus bradycardia, AV blocks, post-MI bradycardia, permanent pacemaker indications, and high-yield clinical pearls.

title: Atrial Fibrillation: The Complete Advanced Resident Guide
summary: A complete advanced resident guide to atrial fibrillation including classification, triggers, acute management, rate control, rhythm control, cardioversion, anticoagulation, antiarrhythmics, ablation, special populations, and landmark trials.

title: Tuberculous Meningitis: A Clinical Reasoning Case
summary: A practical clinical reasoning case on tuberculous meningitis, including fever and headache evaluation, SNOOP red flags, CSF interpretation, miliary pulmonary nodules, antibiotic failure, disseminated TB, and CNS tuberculosis treatment pearls.

title: Persistent Tachycardia After COVID: A Clinical Reasoning Case
summary: A practical clinical reasoning article using a case of persistent tachycardia after COVID to review sinus tachycardia, PE, myocarditis, thyroiditis, anemia, microcytosis, dynamic ECG changes, and problem representation.

title: Defibrillation and Cardioversion: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: A complete resident guide to defibrillation and cardioversion including synchronized versus unsynchronized shocks, indications, energy selection, pad placement, sedation, electrical storm, special populations, complications, and practical checklists.

title: Seizures and Epilepsy: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: A complete resident guide to seizures and epilepsy including definitions, ILAE classification, status epilepticus, non-convulsive status, PNES, seizure mimics, diagnostic workup, AED selection, special populations, and clinical pearls.

title: Headache: Evaluation, Red Flags, Imaging, and Management
summary: A practical framework for evaluating headache including red flags, indications for imaging, migraine, tension headache, cluster headache, giant cell arteritis, subarachnoid hemorrhage, and evidence-based treatment strategies.

title: Implantable Cardioverter-Defibrillators (ICDs): The Complete Resident Guide
summary: A complete resident guide to implantable cardioverter-defibrillators including device types, indications, programming, complications, S-ICD, wearable defibrillators, follow-up, end-of-life care, and landmark trials.

title: Cardiac Pacemakers: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: A practical resident guide to cardiac pacemakers including indications, pacemaker modes, ECG interpretation, CRT, leadless pacing, complications, troubleshooting, and board-style pearls.

title: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction (HFpEF): The Complete Resident Guide
summary: A complete resident guide to HFpEF including definition, pathophysiology, risk factors, diagnosis, H2FPEF and HFA-PEFF scores, mimics, testing, treatment, acute decompensation, phenotypes, and landmark trials.

title: Chest Pain, Pancytopenia, and APML: A Case-Based Approach
summary: A case-based article covering chest pain evaluation, ACS likelihood ratios, EKG interpretation, STEMI criteria, pancytopenia workup, problem representation, APML diagnosis, and urgent treatment with ATRA.

title: Antibiotic Coverage Reference
summary: Interactive antibiotic coverage table using coverage.json with searchable columns, show/hide controls, organism coverage, renal adjustment notes, and clinical pearls.

title: Pathology Foundations: Cellular Injury, Inflammation, Immunodeficiency, Autoimmunity, and Wound Healing
summary: A readable high-yield pathology review of growth adaptations, cellular injury, necrosis, apoptosis, free radical injury, amyloidosis, acute and chronic inflammation, primary immunodeficiency, autoimmune disease, and wound healing.

title: Chest X-Ray Interpretation: A Systematic Approach for Medical Students and Residents
summary: A practical approach to reading chest X-rays using AP vs PA film assessment, the RIPE quality checklist, and the ABCDE interpretation framework.

title: Diarrhea: Practical Approach to Acute and Chronic Diarrhea
summary: A practical resident-level approach to acute and chronic diarrhea including who needs testing, stool studies, empiric antibiotics, antimotility agents, chronic diarrhea subtypes, and first-pass workup.

title: EKG Interpretation: A Systematic Approach for Medical Students and Residents
summary: A practical systematic guide to EKG interpretation using rate, rhythm, axis, intervals, and morphology, including ischemia, hypertrophy, electrolyte abnormalities, arrhythmias, AV blocks, bundle branch blocks, and classic board findings.

title: Infective Endocarditis: Diagnosis, Duke Criteria, and Treatment Pearls
summary: A practical guide to infective endocarditis including classification, blood cultures, Duke criteria, echocardiography, antibiotic selection, treatment duration, surgical indications, and board-style pearls.

title: How to Be a Great Senior Resident: Practical Guide to Team Leadership
summary: A practical guide for PGY-2 and senior residents on leading a team, supporting interns, setting expectations, teaching effectively, giving feedback, and building a healthy team culture.

title: High-Yield Heme/Onc Review: Anemia, Coagulation, Leukemia, Lymphoma, and Pharmacology

title: Iron Deficiency: Practical Approach to Diagnosis and Replacement
summary: Practical guide to diagnosing iron deficiency, distinguishing anemia of chronic disease, choosing oral versus IV iron, dosing iron replacement, avoiding common mistakes, and follow-up monitoring.

title: Low Back Pain: Evaluation, Red Flags, Imaging, and Management
summary: A practical framework for evaluating low back pain including red flags, indications for imaging, conservative therapy, acute versus chronic management, and evidence-based treatment recommendations.

title: Lymphoma vs Leukemia: A Practical Resident Guide
summary: A practical framework for understanding lymphoma versus leukemia, including Hodgkin lymphoma, non-Hodgkin lymphoma, ALL, AML, APML, CLL, CML, diagnosis, staging, treatment principles, and high-yield board pearls.

title: Nephrotic vs Nephritic Syndrome: Practical Approach to Glomerulonephritis
summary: A practical framework for evaluating glomerulonephritis, differentiating nephrotic and nephritic syndromes, and understanding the major primary and secondary causes encountered in clinical practice.

summary: A practical inpatient approach to chronic pressure ulcers and sacral decubitus wounds including wound staging, nutrition, debridement, chronic osteomyelitis, antibiotics, surgical consultation, and discharge planning.

title: Tube Feeds: Practical Inpatient Guide to Starting and Managing Enteral Nutrition

summary: A practical ICU guide to ventilator waveform interpretation including pressure, flow, and volume waveforms, air trapping, double triggering, air leaks, flow hunger, and ventilator loops.

summary: Practical inpatient guide to anticoagulation including DVT prophylaxis, therapeutic anticoagulation, DOAC selection, heparin drips, LMWH dosing, obesity adjustments, and choosing between apixaban and rivaroxaban.

summary: Practical approach to cellulitis including MRSA assessment, cefazolin versus vancomycin, IV versus oral antibiotics, treatment duration, and common pitfalls.

summary: A practical inpatient approach to headache evaluation and treatment including red flags, migraine cocktails, anti-dopaminergic therapy, magnesium, triptans, and common pitfalls.

title: Pain Regimen: Practical Inpatient Approach
summary: A practical inpatient guide to pain control including acetaminophen, NSAIDs, topical agents, opioids, neuropathic pain medications, methadone, ketamine, buprenorphine, and post-operative pain management.

summary: Practical approach to acute pancreatitis including diagnosis, causes, fluid resuscitation, nutrition, severity assessment, and complications.
